LightLayout 1:3
Precision Lighting Layout System
“Let there be light.”

COMPANY BRANDING / PDF LOGO

SAVE / LOAD / SHARE JOB

Download creates a small .json job file that can be emailed, saved, or loaded later.

1. ROOM & LAYOUT

Presets are starting points. You can still change any value manually.

2. LAYOUT TYPE

Top/bottom offset controls rows. Left/right offset controls columns.
Locked mode snaps office fixtures to real 2 ft ceiling tile grid lines.

STUD / JOIST DETECTION

User must enter the first stud/joist location. The app does not assume framing starts 16" from a wall.

3. FIXTURE & LIGHT SPECS

Fixture defaults are separate for recessed, office drop-in, and high bay so they do not interfere with each other.

4. VIEW OPTIONS

Phone tip: scroll sideways across the drawing for a larger, clearer layout.
Phone tip: Use Zoom controls or pinch/scroll around the drawing.
Measurements are center-to-center. Physical mode estimates foot-candles; true engineered accuracy requires manufacturer IES photometric files.

5. MEASUREMENTS SUMMARY

DROP CEILING NOTES

2x2 fixtures fit one 24" x 24" ceiling tile.

2x4 fixtures fit one 24" x 48" ceiling tile.

Locked grid mode rounds fixture centers to 24" tile increments so the plan matches a T-bar ceiling.
